label: 2671 to 2674 Transferred

L. 88–164, title I, § 133Pub. L. 91–517, title I, § 101(b)84 Stat. 1318section 6007 of this titleOct. 30, 1970A prior section 2673, , , , provided that within six months after , the Secretary, after consultation with the Federal Hospital Council, prescribe to the States (1) what constitutes adequate services for mentally retarded persons, (2) the method of determining priority of projects, (3) standards of construction and equipment, and (4) that the State plan provide adequate facilities for the mentally retarded including persons unable to pay therefor.Pub.
